series_metadata.series_description: These documents are submitted daily by commercial permit holders authorized to conduct pair muted betting on horse racing. These documents substantiate and verify the amounts reported on the permit holders daily reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy by shredding. Documents will be destroyed five years after the end of the calendar year for forms received during the calendar year. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Delete documents five years after the end of the calendar year for forms received during the calendar year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
